name: jieyu
description: 解语 (Jieyu) — 濒危语言科研协作平台

scripts.check:panel-foundation: npm run check:dialog-style-guard && npm run check:architecture-guard
scripts.gate:timeline-phase1: npm run check:architecture-guard && npm run test:timeline-regression && npm run build
scripts.test:panel-regression: vitest run src/components/AiAnalysisPanel.test.tsx src/components/AudioImportDialog.test.tsx src/components/ConfirmDeleteDialog.test.tsx src/components/LayerManagerPopover.test.tsx src/components/NotePanel.test.tsx src/components/PdfViewerPanel.test.tsx src/components/ShortcutsPanel.test.tsx src/components/SidePaneSidebarSpeakerManagement.test.tsx src/components/transcription/LeftRailProjectHub.test.tsx src/components/transcription/RegionActionOverlay.test.tsx src/components/transcription/SpeakerActionDialog.test.tsx src/components/transcription/toolbar/UndoHistory.test.tsx src/components/ai/AiChatCard.input.test.tsx src/components/ai/AiChatMetricsBar.test.tsx src/components/ai/AiEmbeddingCard.test.tsx src/components/ai/AiComplexPanels.rtlMatrix.test.tsx
scripts.gate:panel-phase1: npm run check:panel-foundation && npm run check:panel-shared-purity:phase1 && npm run test:panel-regression
scripts.test: npm run check:messages-imports && npm run check:locale-usage && npm run check:dialog-style-guard && npm run check:i18n-hardcoded:guard && npm run check:segmentation-storage-boundary && npm run check:tier-boundary-imports && npm run check:tierid-diffusion && npm run check:architecture-guard && vitest run
scripts.build:profile: npm run build && npm run profile:build-assets
scripts.build:guard: npm run build && npm run profile:build-assets && npm run check:build-budgets && npm run audit:prod
